title: Add Lunar AI to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Lunar AI](https://luquinhasamc.github.io/My-Hub-AI-Projects/prs/LunarAI.html) to chat
- Uses AI chat to hold conversations. Provides a simple, elegant interface that is easy to use.

Fixes #10166

gist.headline: Lunar AI touches down
gist.blurb: The greenhouse just got a little more celestial! Lunar AI has landed in the community showcase, bringing a sleek new interface for your AI conversations.
gist.summary: Added Lunar AI, a new conversational interface with a simple and elegant design, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and try out Lunar AI's chat interface directly from the community greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: A space/moon theme mixed with the greenhouse/growth motif. Polly the bee wearing a tiny astronaut helmet, tending to a glowing moon-shaped plant in a cozy digital greenhouse.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny astronaut helmet, watering a glowing moon-shaped plant in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny astronaut helmet, watering a glowing moon-shaped plant in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
